summary.intent: Implement GitHub issue #279: the ScrollArea agnostic core component for the ars-ui Rust library, including state machine, API, effects, and full test coverage.
summary.outcome: PR #699 opened with all 60 lib tests, 13 snapshot fixtures, proptest, doctest, and spec-conformance passing; cargo xci-fast (10 gates) green. Pass-4 Codex fixes committed and pushed, awaiting final Codex re-run before merge.

repo: The workspace uses a named-intent effect pattern (e.g., Effect::AutoHide) so the agnostic core emits intent and the adapter owns the timer — mirrors tooltip and rating_group conventions.
Duration (not u32 hide_delay_ms) is the workspace convention for delay props, matching tooltip/hover_card/avatar, and carries a Default value.
context_changed is set whenever an apply closure runs, not on value-diff — be careful not to treat it as a change-detection signal.
set_state_for_test is #[cfg(test)] in ars-core and is unavailable cross-crate.
snapshot-reviewed label is required on PRs that add .snap fixture files.
ars-dom::Axis uses {Horizontal, Vertical} while scroll_area defines {X, Y} — a naming divergence that was not reconciled.
CI uses a floating @stable toolchain (currently 1.96.0); pre-existing lints can newly fail on toolchain bumps.
Insta --accept is blocked by pre-existing i18n-gated snapshot orphans; pending snapshots must be manually promoted.
context_only closures require explicit |ctx: &mut Context| type annotations because Rust infers the wrong type without them.

code.finding: ScrollOrientation gating was missing; added allows_x/allows_y helpers and updated update_visibility to gate by orientation.
on_props_changed was not implemented; added SyncProps event mirroring the collapsible component pattern.
Resize did not clear stale visibility flags; update_visibility(active) now clamps flags off for non-overflowing axes.
Hover state stuck visible after pointer left overlaid track; fixed by tracking hovering_root so the last leave (root or scrollbar) hides the scrollbar.
ThumbDragMove clamped at 0 but not the upper bound; added clamp to [0, track_size - thumb_size].
ThumbDragEnd in Scroll mode never restarted the AutoHide timer; now re-emits Effect::AutoHide on drag-end when in Scroll mode.

workflow: gh api integer fields require -F (not -f) for in_reply_to to be sent as an integer, not a string.
After a push that appears to succeed, verify the upstream ref actually advanced before assuming CI picked up the commit.
Background Insta snapshot jobs can race and produce stale .pending.snap files; serialize snapshot acceptance steps.
Pre-existing clippy errors (e.g., map_or_else with identity in pagination/mod.rs) block crate-wide clippy and must be opportunistically fixed before the gate passes.
Multi-round Codex review is an effective audit loop: each round can surface edge cases (negative track sizes, drag-state guard gaps, RTL delegation to canonical helpers) missed by prior rounds.

friction: Insta --accept blocked by pre-existing i18n-gated snapshot orphans, requiring manual snapshot promotion.
Background snapshot jobs raced, producing stale .pending.snap files that needed cleanup.
Pre-existing clippy error in pagination/mod.rs blocked crate-wide clippy until opportunistically fixed.
gh api -f vs -F integer field gotcha caused failed API calls for in_reply_to.
Push appeared to succeed but upstream ref had not advanced, requiring a second explicit push.
context_only closures silently inferred the wrong type without explicit |ctx: &mut Context| annotations.
normalize_scroll_left was a buggy reinvention of an existing canonical helper in ars_collections; discovered late in review.
open_items: Pass-4 Codex fixes are committed/pushed but Codex has not been re-triggered; merge is pending Codex approval.
ars-dom::Axis {Horizontal, Vertical} vs scroll_area Axis {X, Y} naming divergence was not reconciled.
Adapter spec prop sketches were updated with scrollbar_cross_size but full Leptos/Dioxus adapter implementations were not written in this session.
ThumbDragging not counted as active session in is_session_active (Pass-4 fix committed but not yet Codex-verified).
MouseEnter guard against active drag (Pass-4 fix committed but not yet Codex-verified).
ThumbDragStart cancellation of running AutoHide timer (Pass-4 fix committed but not yet Codex-verified).
SyncProps should reset Hovering (not just ScrollActive) when new orientation mode doesn't support hover (Pass-4 fix committed but not yet Codex-verified).
